title: selaginella schumannii
intro: Selaginella schumannii, also known as the Spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, rhizomatous fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Selaginella schumannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
